name: Cucumber Pickles
recipeInstructions:
PICKLE A: Combine all ingredients and serve.
PICKLE B: Place cucumber slices and onion in a bowl and toss. Blend the chili peppers, garlic, cilantro root, and peppercorns into a rough paste. Blend the vinegar, soy sauce, sugar, and cilantro leaves into another mixture. Mix together the two prepared mixtures and pour over the cucumbers and onions. Place in a serving dish, sprinkle with cilantro leaves and crushed peanuts, and serve immediately. To make it hotter, add more red pepper or a shake or two of cayenne.
